content:
type: ANSWER
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: My debug logging adds one guarded self._logger.debug(...) call inside the existing reset block in receive() (stream_end/cache_hit/field_start_queue/field_end_queue/stream_start), plus similar guarded log calls at start-detection, rolling-end-check, emit, and flush() sites. I do not rename/extract that block into a helper, so your _reset_state() extraction should be a mechanical refactor around my added log line -- just keep the debug log call in the extracted helper so both reset paths (receive() and tick()) emit it.

I do not rename/extract that block into a helper, so your _reset_state() extraction should be a mechanical refactor around my added log line -- just keep the debug log call in the extracted helper so both reset paths (receive() and tick()) emit it.
